purpose: Pre-soak safety and availability gate for the Windows-first release closeout.
constraints: Do not interfere with PR #641 diagnostic-input repair.
Do not interfere with text-stream portal live validation.
Stop with blocked-awaiting-coordinator if the Windows host is unavailable or a soak would conflict with live validation.

open_pr_context.title: feat: add portal diagnostic input injector [hud-t95gs]

probes.name: ssh_hud-user_whoami
probes.command: ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o ServerAliveInterval=5 -o ServerAliveCountMax=1 -o BatchMode=yes -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/hud-ssh-key hud-user@windows-host.example "whoami"
probes.stderr: ssh: connect to host windows-host.example port 22: Connection timed out

probes.name: ssh_admin-user_whoami
probes.command: ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o ServerAliveInterval=5 -o ServerAliveCountMax=1 -o BatchMode=yes -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/hud-ssh-key admin-user@windows-host.example "whoami"
probes.stderr: ssh: connect to host windows-host.example port 22: Connection timed out

probes.name: tcp_connectivity
probes.command: nc -vz -w 5 windows-host.example 22; nc -vz -w 5 windows-host.example 50051; nc -vz -w 5 windows-host.example 9090
probes.stderr:
nc: connect to windows-host.example (100.87.181.125) port 22 (tcp) timed out: Operation now in progress
nc: connect to windows-host.example (100.87.181.125) port 50051 (tcp) timed out: Operation now in progress
nc: connect to windows-host.example (100.87.181.125) port 9090 (tcp) timed out: Operation now in progress

verdict.reason: The reference Windows host did not accept SSH or HUD port connections within explicit non-interactive timeouts.
